insights: Severe Port Congestion at Cat Lai (HCM): Expect 3-5 day vessel berthing delays.
Customs Fluidity: Regulatory changes for textiles require meticulous HS Code classification to avoid fines.
LCL Advantage: Small shippers can bypass full container shortages by using consolidated weekly sailings.
Infrastructure: Expressway development toward Hai Phong is improving lead times for Northern industrial zones.
pain_points: Lack of visibility into road transport from industrial zones to port.
High demurrage fees for new shippers unfamiliar with clearance timelines.
Vessel rerouting due to Red Sea tensions adding 10-15 days to transit.

insights: Mumbai/JNPT Congestion: Direct rail access to port is currently under maintenance, causing truck queues.
Trade Agreement Benefits: New India-EU FTA discussions provide potential duty drawbacks for automotive parts.
Customs: Errors in classification often lead to 20-day delays at Mumbai ports.
pain_points: Complex documentation for specialized machinery exports.
Fluctuating fuel surcharges on ocean freight.
Security risks (theft/vandalism) in specific inland transit corridors.

insights: Lagos/Durban Congestion: Major bottlenecks often caused by outdated facilities; prioritize smaller ports if possible.
Fragmentation: Multi-operator logistics landscape requires local 'boots on the ground' for transparency.
pain_points: High security risks and potential cargo theft in unstable transit zones.

advice: Standardize documentation early (Invoice/Packing List) to avoid administrative 'red tape'.
Prioritize 'Predictability' over 'Lowest Cost' to build initial supply chain reliability.
Always verify HS Codes twice for emerging market exports.
Invest in local partnerships for faster customs clearance.

response_templates.propose_strategy: Hi {{companyName}}, following up on our discovery. For your {{industry}} shipments on the {{laneOrigin}} to {{laneDestination}} route, I've identified a key strategic move: {{strategicReasoning}}. Specifically, {{insight}}. Our team at Elite specialized in navigating {{pain_point}} for new shippers. Would you like to see a custom quote based on this approach? {{senderName}}, {{senderRole}}
